Apr 3, 2026 · Order routed to Mike

Fiona · Apr 3 at 9:14am

Hi Mike — buyer has confirmed Studio XL in Coastal White. All deposits secured. Production start confirmed for today. One note: the buyer specifically requested White Oak LVP flooring, which is an upgrade. Just double-checking you have stock before we lock the spec.

You · Apr 3 at 10:02am

Yes, we have White Oak in stock. No issue there. Good to go on the spec.

Read by Fiona

Apr 4, 2026

Fiona · Today at 10:48am

Quick one before framing starts — the engineering drawings show 5/8" anchor bolts on 6ft centers for the foundation holdowns. Can you confirm your team is using that spec? Site GC (Bill) is pouring the slab Monday and needs to know the bolt pattern today.

Needs reply · SLA: 1h 12m

bolt_pattern_drawing.jpg attached
